race.comment: SISTER MARY (7) stepped out in trip for the first time last start and improved drastically, sitting handy and bolting in by 4.6L. Still has plenty of upside and what she showed last start was very exciting. Rates highly on the back of that effort and with a favourable set up again today, she can repeat the dose. MAXWHOOSHTAPIN (1) comes back in grade today after closing off well when getting a mile back last time out. He does have the ability to sit on the speed if Harvey wishes, but the easier company today helps and he can make his presence felt. ALL LACED UP (5) got the job done two back before closing nicely over 1700m here last start. Out in trip again now looks a good move and the good draw should see her get every chance. Wouldn't surprise to see her improve quickly. SHAULA (3) was better last start and can't be discounted off that performance. SWEET SURRENDER (2) creates some interest getting straight out in trip second-up.
